explicit: Ink TUI render tearing and jitter
symptoms: Terminal text jitters or flickers when typing in Ink CLI (Claude/Gemini prompts)

Rewind navigation loops infinitely through menu entries without detecting the target message even though it is visible on screen
Arrow key navigation in Rewind menu becomes unresponsive or gets stuck after encountering entries at the boundary between visible and stale history
Prompt displays raw ANSI escape codes as visible text (e.g., `38;2;153;153;153m❯`)
Prompt color is lost and text appears in default terminal color instead of expected gray
Escape sequence parameters render as visible characters instead of applying text formatting
Issue occurs randomly in 1-5% of cases, more frequent during high system load
xterm.js parser aborts escape sequence rendering when OSC 7777 marker injected mid-sequence
list_sub_agents returns empty array after app restart, losing all previously delegated task references.
Calling continue_claude on a dead PTY hangs indefinitely or fails instead of auto-respawning the process.

Sub-agent tabs remain in the UI after detaching or closing; phantom entries accumulate in mcpTasks Map.
SubAgentBar displays zero tasks after restart instead of preserving the actual cumulative task count from database.
